intent: Bundle a Figma design, a Jira story, and a customer markdown brief that all describe the same Open-Account flow but contribute different pieces of intent.
notes: Open-Account baseline: Figma describes the screens and fields; the Jira story (ACCT-2001) carries the regulatory framing and reviewer flow; the customer markdown adds business rules (German postcode, Tax-ID checksum reviewer step) that never made it into either of the other two sources. Used to exercise multi-source reconciliation.
